scope: Public TAS source index for Contra route research. This file records source metadata only and does not include ROMs, TAS input files, full input logs, or direct replay data.

target_rom.name: Contra (U) [!].nes
target_rom.match_conclusion: This matches the project Contra USA ROM hash. It is not the same ROM version as the current fastest published FCEUX FM2 movies, which mostly target Japan-region ROMs.

source_pages.name: TASVideos Contra game page
source_pages.notes: Lists Contra game versions, publications, submissions, user files, and watch files. Confirms the USA MD5 and Japan MD5 values.

source_pages.name: TASVideos Contra game resources
source_pages.notes: Documents Contra TAS tricks, current publications, RAM watch links, boss and RNG notes, and external technical resources.

source_pages.name: FCEUX FM2 format
source_pages.notes: Primary format reference for parsing FCEUX FM2 movie headers and input logs.

source_pages.name: TASVideos BizHawk BK2 format
source_pages.notes: Primary format reference for parsing BizHawk BK2 archives and input logs.

candidates.title: NES Contra "1 player" by Mars608 & aiqiyou in 08:48.21
do_not_use_for: exact frame numbers in browser runtime
RNG assumptions without USA trace verification
candidates.notes: Useful as a high-quality route reference, but version mismatch requires RAM trace alignment and US validation.

candidates.title: NES Contra "2 players" by Mars608 & aiqiyou in 08:36.57
do_not_use_for: US exact revive timing without local validation
candidates.notes: Valuable for companion behavior design because it exposes cooperative route concepts.

candidates.title: NES Contra "2 players, low%" by Mars608 & aiqiyou in 08:49.36
candidates.goal: 2 players low percent using starting pea shooter
use_for: boss strategies without relying on spread gun
candidates.notes: Useful when designing fallback behaviors for weak weapon states.

candidates.title: Contra 1P improvement / contra-1P-31745.fm2
candidates.emulator: FCEUX family, exact version not listed on user-file page
candidates.game_version: Contra, likely Japan route lineage; verify header before use
use_for: candidate source for published 1P route lineage
header inspection if local analysis is later authorized
do_not_use_for: assuming USA compatibility before header/hash check
committing downloaded movie file to repo
candidates.notes: Record only as a candidate. Do not download into project references.

candidates.title: Sam_Underscore's NES Contra "Obliteration, single player" in 13:45.26
use_for: USA-version sync and RAM alignment experiments
candidates.notes: Rejected for goal and quality issues. Useful mainly because it targets the same USA ROM version.

candidates.title: Contra all targets - test improvement / Contra all targets_ThunderAxe31_test.bk2
candidates.emulator: BizHawk family, exact version not listed on user-file page
use_for: short BK2 parsing sample if later authorized
do_not_use_for: assuming target ROM compatibility before header/hash check
candidates.notes: Only 29 seconds. Keep as metadata candidate.

candidates.title: NES Contra "1 player" by Genisto in 09:34.117
use_for: coarse route landmarks if converted or visually inspected later
candidates.notes: Version matched but old Famtasia FMV format makes it less useful for the FM2/BK2 pipeline.

candidates.title: NES Contra (USA) "pacifist" by krieg747 in 10:33.33
candidates.notes: Version matched but old format and obsolete status make it secondary.

version_match_summary.best_current_fm2_sources: Mostly Japan ROM variants, especially Contra (Japan).nes and Contra (J).nes.
version_match_summary.target_rom_sources: USA-matched sources exist, but public high-quality current routes are not primarily USA FM2. USA-matched items include old Famtasia FMV publications and at least one rejected BizHawk BK2 submission.
version_match_summary.decision: Use Japan FM2 movies as route knowledge and timing hypotheses. Use USA-matched sources and browser RAM logs to validate or reject each derived WorldX segment.
